summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tilt AI iteration 6 - Unified Tilt mode (merged Assist+Guide). All 33 backend tests passed (100%) including 10 new tests for POST /api/tilt unified endpoint. Frontend landing page renders correctly with no console errors. All required data-testid attributes verified.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 OK with status and timestamp
POST /api/tilt with regular question returns {type: 'chat', response: '...'}
POST /api/tilt with guidance request + image returns {type: 'guide', instruction, region, is_complete, step_summary, step_number}
POST /api/tilt with guide_active=true + image continues guidance
POST /api/tilt with conversation history works
POST /api/tilt with screen_context uses it in chat response
POST /api/tilt with user_preference and tone_traits works
POST /api/tilt returns 422 for missing message
POST /api/tilt correctly detects guidance requests (how do i, show me how, help me, etc.)
POST /api/tilt correctly detects chat requests (no image or non-action questions)
POST /api/assist accepts basic message and returns {response, mode: 'chat'}
POST /api/assist uses screen_context in its response
POST /api/assist supports conversation continuation with previous messages
POST /api/assist works with all parameters
POST /api/assist returns 422 for missing message
POST /api/analyze-screen accepts base64 JPEG image and returns context/activity
POST /api/analyze-screen handles data URI prefix correctly
POST /api/analyze-screen returns 422 for missing image_base64
POST /api/generate-decisions works with basic input
POST /api/generate-decisions returns safe/smart/bold/reasoning JSON structure
POST /api/generate-decisions works with screen context
POST /api/generate-decisions works with user_preference and tone_traits
POST /api/generate-decisions works with all parameters combined
POST /api/generate-decisions returns 422 for missing input_text
POST /api/guide-step accepts {image_base64, task, completed_steps, step_number} and returns guidance
POST /api/guide-step returns region with x, y coordinates (0-1 range) and label
POST /api/guide-step advances through steps correctly with completed_steps
POST /api/guide-step returns is_complete boolean flag
POST /api/guide-step handles data URI prefix correctly
POST /api/guide-step returns 422 for missing required fields
Full integration flow: analyze screen -> generate decisions
Landing page renders with 'Decide better, together.' headline
Start Decision Layer button present and clickable

All data-testid attributes present for Tilt mode (mode-tilt-btn, mode-decide-btn, pip-screen-context, pip-decision-input, pip-submit-btn, guide-view, guide-stop-btn, guide-instruction, guide-complete, pip-insight)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly including new unified /api/tilt endpoint that auto-detects chat vs guide mode. The /api/tilt endpoint returns {type:'chat'|'guide',...} based on message content and presence of image. Guide mode triggers on phrases like 'how do i', 'show me how', 'help me', 'where is', etc. when an image is provided. Screen sharing and PiP features cannot be fully automated due to browser permissions. Use localhost:8001 for backend testing to avoid proxy 403 errors for large payloads.

tilt_unified_endpoint.description: New POST /api/tilt unified endpoint that auto-detects if user needs chat help or step-by-step guidance

merged_tilt_mode_ui.description: FloatingPalette and CommandPalette now have 2 tabs: 'Tilt' (unified chat+guide) and 'Decide' (Safe/Smart/Bold)
features: Tilt mode auto-detects if user needs chat or step-by-step guidance from the same tab
Guide mode activates when action request + screenshot provided
Chat mode for regular questions without screenshots
Context leak fix - screen analysis ignores floating PiP windows/overlays
PiP re-renders less frequently (12s interval, only on context change)
merged_tilt_mode_ui.status: VERIFIED via source code review - cannot automate screen share
